About Medical Care in Miami-Dade County

Miami-Dade County, Florida is home to 7871 verified medical professionals spanning 33 specialties. The county's healthcare landscape includes specialists in Internal Medicine, Family Medicine, Psychiatry, Emergency Medicine, Anesthesiology, ensuring residents have access to comprehensive medical care.

With doctors practicing in 155 cities across the county, including MIAMI, HIALEAH, MIAMI BEACH, patients can find quality healthcare close to home. 2356 doctors are also willing to travel, providing additional flexibility for patients with mobility challenges or those in underserved areas.

All doctors listed on EliteMD are verified through the National Provider Identifier (NPI) Registry, ensuring accurate credentials and practice information. Our directory helps patients make informed decisions when choosing a healthcare provider in Miami-Dade County.

Frequently Asked Questions

How many doctors are in Miami-Dade County, Florida?
EliteMD lists 7871 verified medical professionals across 33 specialties in Miami-Dade County, Florida. This includes specialists in Internal Medicine, Family Medicine, Psychiatry, and more.
What are the top medical specialties in Miami-Dade County?
The most represented specialties in Miami-Dade County are Internal Medicine (1112 doctors), Family Medicine (887 doctors), Psychiatry (612 doctors), Emergency Medicine (442 doctors), Anesthesiology (372 doctors).
Which cities in Miami-Dade County have the most doctors?
The cities with the most doctors in Miami-Dade County are MIAMI (3542), HIALEAH (583), MIAMI BEACH (552), CORAL GABLES (467), SOUTH MIAMI (463).
How are doctors in Miami-Dade County verified?
All doctors on EliteMD are verified through the National Provider Identifier (NPI) Registry, a federal database maintained by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services. Each doctor's credentials, specialty, and practice location are confirmed through official records.
Can I find a specialist who will travel to Miami-Dade County?
Yes, many specialists on EliteMD are available to travel. Use the "Will Travel" filter on the search page to find doctors willing to come to Miami-Dade County for consultations and procedures.
